parameters.jsCode:
const p = ($json && $json.body) || $json || {};
const grade = Number(p.grade); const safeGrade = Number.isFinite(grade) && grade > 0 ? grade : 5;
const duration = Number(p.duration); const safeDuration = Number.isFinite(duration) && duration > 0 ? duration : 60;
const system = [
  'You are Sheldon, building a 1:1 tutoring class presentation.',
  '',
  'MANDATORY 10-section pedagogical flow (in this order):',
  '1. Icebreaker / Rapport (1 slide)',
  '2. Warm-up (1-2 slides)',
  '3. Learning Objective (1 slide)',
  '4. Definition (1-2 slides, type: definition)',
  '5. Explanation with examples (3-5 slides; mix definition / image_caption / compare)',
  '6. Activity (3 slides, type: ido_wedo_youdo)',
  '7. Skill Task (1-2 slides)',
  '8. Quick Assessment (5 slides, type: quiz)',
  '9. Key Takeaways (1 slide, type: takeaway)',
  '10. Closure HOTS (1 slide)',
  '',
  'Slide types: title, definition, image_caption, compare, ido_wedo_youdo, quiz, drag_sort, fill_blank, video, takeaway.',
  'Aim for 15-20 slides total for a 60-minute class.',
  'Each slide MUST have: type, title (or term for definition), notes (teacher script 2-4 sentences).',
  '',
  'Return ONLY valid JSON. No prose before or after. No markdown fences. Shape:',
  '{ "slides": [ { "type": "title", "title": "...", "body": "...", "notes": "..." } ] }'
].join('\n');
const user = [
  'Topic: ' + (p.topic || '') + ', Sub-topic: ' + (p.subtopic || '') + '.',
  'Grade: ' + safeGrade + ', Subject: ' + (p.subject || 'Maths') + '.',
  'Class duration: ' + safeDuration + ' minutes.',
  'Difficulty: ' + (p.difficulty || 'Medium') + '.'
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { system, user, _payload: p, _kind: 'presentation-generate' } }];

parameters.jsCode:
const p = ($json && $json.body) || $json || {};
const grade = Number(p.grade); const safeGrade = Number.isFinite(grade) && grade > 0 ? grade : 5;
const system = [
  'You are Sheldon, designing a quick interactive learning game.',
  '',
  'Game styles and JSON shapes (pick the one matching the requested style):',
  'sort: { "gameType": "sort", "payload": { "items": ["..."], "buckets": [ { "name": "...", "correctItems": ["..."] } ] } }',
  'match: { "gameType": "match", "payload": { "pairs": [ { "left": "...", "right": "..." } ] } }',
  'sequence: { "gameType": "sequence", "payload": { "items": ["..."], "correctOrder": [0,1,2,3] } }',
  'fill-blank: { "gameType": "fill-blank", "payload": { "sentence": "...", "blanks": ["...","..."] } }',
  'quiz: { "gameType": "quiz", "payload": { "questions": [ { "text": "...", "options": ["A","B","C","D"], "correctIndex": 0 } ] } }',
  '',
  'Rules:',
  '- 5-8 items / 4-6 questions per game.',
  '- Match grade level.',
  '',
  'Return ONLY valid JSON. No prose before or after. No markdown fences.'
].join('\n');
const user = [
  'Topic: ' + (p.topic || '') + ', Sub-topic: ' + (p.subtopic || '') + '.',
  'Grade: ' + safeGrade + ', Subject: ' + (p.subject || 'Maths') + '.',
  'Game style: ' + (p.gameStyle || 'sort') + '.'
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { system, user, _payload: p, _kind: 'game-generate' } }];
